listItemRules.message: The 'ListItem' component can only be nested in the 'List,ListItemGroup' parent component.
The component 'ListItemGroup' can only have the child component 'ListItem'.
The 'ListItemGroup' component can only be nested in the 'List' parent component.

gridChildRules.message: The component 'Grid' can only have the child component 'GridItem'.

imageChildRules.message: The component 'Image' can't have any child.

buttonChildRules.message: The 'Button' component can have only one child component.
The Button component with a label parameter can not have any child.
